def negative_python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_lock_held_during_await_or_io():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_lock_held_during_await_or_io"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag locks held while awaiting, doing network I/O, or touching disk."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
